title: Beehiiv vs AWeber (2025): Which Is Better?
meta_description: Compare Beehiiv and AWeber email marketing tools. See pricing, features, ratings, and which platform suits your needs best.
intro: Beehiiv and AWeber are both popular email marketing platforms, but they serve different audiences and use cases. Beehiiv focuses on newsletter monetization and growth for media creators, while AWeber emphasizes simplicity for bloggers and solopreneurs. Understanding their differences will help you choose the right tool for your business.
choose_a_if: You're a newsletter publisher looking to monetize your audience through ads and sponsorships
You want built-in analytics, segmentation, and a web reader for subscriber engagement
You need a growing subscriber base on the free plan (up to 2,500 subscribers)
choose_b_if: You're a blogger or solopreneur seeking an affordable, user-friendly email platform
You need landing pages, RSS-to-email automation, and AMP email support
Budget is your primary concern and you want paid plans starting at just $15/month

faq.a: It depends on your needs. Beehiiv excels for newsletter publishers and media creators with monetization features and higher ratings (4.7 vs 4.2 on G2), while AWeber is better for bloggers and solopreneurs prioritizing simplicity and affordability. Beehiiv is the more advanced platform overall, but AWeber is more straightforward to use.

faq.q: Which is cheaper, Beehiiv or AWeber?
faq.a: AWeber is significantly cheaper, starting at $15/month compared to Beehiiv's $39/month. However, Beehiiv's free tier supports 2,500 subscribers versus AWeber's 500, making Beehiiv more cost-effective if you're scaling without paying.

faq.q: Can I switch from AWeber to Beehiiv?
faq.a: Yes, both platforms support email list migration and typically offer CSV export/import capabilities. Before switching, contact both platforms' support teams to ensure a smooth transition of your subscribers and automation workflows.
